Title: Verify successful user authentication
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password
2. Click the "Login" button
3. Check the response from the server
Expected Result: The user is authenticated successfully and redirected to the main page.

Title: Verify unsuccessful user authentication
Test Steps:
1. Enter the invalid username and password
2. Click the "Login" button
3. Check the response from the server
Expected Result: The user is not authenticated, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Create a new user profile
Test Data: Valid user data (name, email, password, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Create Profile" button
2. Enter the required user data
3. Click the "Save" button
4. Check the user data in the database
Expected Result: The new user profile is created and saved in the database.

Title: Update an existing user profile
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has a profile
Test Data: Updated user data (name, email, password, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Edit Profile" button
2. Enter the updated user data
3. Click the "Save" button
4. Check the user data in the database
Expected Result: The user profile is updated and saved in the database.

Title: Register a new consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Consumption" button
2. Enter the consumption data
3. Click the "Save" button
4. Check the consumption data in the database
Expected Result: The new consumption record is created and saved in the database.

Title: Update an existing consumption record
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has a consumption record
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Edit Consumption" button
2. Enter the updated consumption data
3. Click the "Save" button
4. Check the consumption data in the database
Expected Result: The consumption record is updated and saved in the database.

Title: Generate a report for a user
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has consumption records
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Generate Report" button
2. Check the generated report
Expected Result: The report is generated correctly based on the user's consumption records.

Title: Delete a report for a user
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has a report
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Delete Report" button
2. Confirm the deletion
3. Check the report is no longer available

Title: Award an achievement to a user
Preconditions: User is authenticated and meets the achievement criteria
Test Steps:
1. Check the user's consumption records
2. If the user meets the achievement criteria, award the achievement
3. Check the user's achievements
Expected Result: The user is awarded the achievement, and it is added to their profile.

Title: Verify that an achievement is not awarded to a user who does not meet the criteria
Test Steps:
1. Check the user's consumption records
2. If the user does not meet the achievement criteria, do not award the achievement
3. Check the user's achievements
Expected Result: The user is not awarded the achievement, and it is not added to their profile.
